plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-630 RP20.P05.M06.S05-RP20.P06.M02.S18 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-630 covers the RP20 Data Room And VDR P05 fixture closeout and P06 permission matrix bridge over 150 planned units, preserving no-write, no-real-data, P05 fixture closeout, P06 permission matrix, P06 decision binding, P06 security interaction, and P06 permission fixture boundaries without opening Data Room or VDR runtime behavior.
